title: Registration & Accommodation - ICBAB 2026
content:
Registration & Accommodation Please review the fee structure below for National and International participants. 
                Registration should be done online using the same email account used for abstract submission. Registration Fee Details Comprehensive fee structure for all categories Category National Participants (INR) International Participants (USD) UG/PG Ph.D./Post-Doc/ Research Staff Faculty/ Scientist Industry Accompanying Person Early Bird Registration (Till 31 Mar 2026) Conference 2000 2500 3500 5000 1000 $100 Workshop + Conference 3000 3500 4500 6000 NA $130 Normal Registration (1 April to 10 May 2026) Conference 2500 3000 4000 6000 1000 $130 Workshop + Conference 3500 4000 5000 7000 NA $160 Late-Bird Registration (11 May to 24 May 2026) Conference 3000 3500 4500 7000 2000 $160 Workshop + Conference 4000 4500 5500 8000 NA $190 On Spot Registration (25 May to 27 May 2026) Conference 3500 4000 5000 8000 2500 $200 Workshop + Conference 4500 5000 6000 9000 NA $250 * Online participation and presentation are now permitted for participants from distant locations. Such participants may attend all sessions conducted in online mode and will be provided with e-certificates. Click here to view Step-by-Step Registration Guidelines Register Now Clicking above will open the Google Form. Payment Details Wire Transfer (International Only) Name of Beneficiary: Jaypee University of Information Technology Beneficiary Bank: Punjab National Bank Account No.: 0427032100000010 Swift Code: PUNBINBBPAR Bank Address: JUIT, Waknaghat, Po.:- Waknaghat, Teh:- Kandaghat, Distt. Solan, State:- H.P., Pin Code:- 173234 Online Transfer (Within India) Bank Name: Punjab National Bank Branch Name: Shimla Address: THE MALL, SHIMLA, H.P. Beneficiary: JUIT, Waknaghat Account No: 0427002100682105 IFSC Code: PUNB0042700 MICR Code: 171024002 Account Type: Current Scan & Pay (UPI) SCAN & PAY USING ANY BHIM UPI APP Important Payment Information Payment should be made by bank transfer ; details are included in the registration form. Conference registration fee is non-refundable and non-transferable . Registration fee covers hospitality and kit only ; it does not include accommodation charges. For further details, please download the participant guidelines . Accommodation Details Accommodation arranged on prior request and pre-payment basis. Accommodation Fee Details (Per Day) Accommodation Categories Non-Sharing Sharing Indian International Indian International University Hostel Rs. 1000/- $ 60 Rs. 700/- $ 50 Nearby Hotels Rs. 2000-3000/- $ 90 Rs. 1000-1800/- $ 80 Note: Hostel fee includes Dinner and Breakfast.
